title: Thyrocare Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Thyrocare Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Thyrocare Digital Technologies:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare Digital Technologies!
